subcodes.first_line: Hearken unto the call of Husayn which hath been raised betwixt earth and heaven: O Husayn, thou true star [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بشنو ندای حسین را که مابین ارض و سما مرتفع گشته ای حسین ستارهای حقیقی
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @justice and wrath of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
